zh.Herstmonceux Castle, Sussex, England: 英國素可賀斯特蒙瑟 卡素
zh.Herstmonceux, Sussex, England, United Ki: 英國英格蘭素可賀斯特蒙瑟
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Fiennes於大約1422年出生在英國素可賀斯特蒙瑟時，他的父親Sir Roger Fiennes40歲，母親Elizabeth Holand20歲。他於1446年6月之後與Joan Dacre在英國倫敦結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1459年被列為7th lord dacre。他去世於1483年11月25日在英國素可賀斯特蒙瑟 卡素享年62歲，埋葬在英國素可賀斯特蒙瑟。

zh-hans.Herstmonceux Castle, Sussex, England: 英国素可賀斯特蒙瑟 卡素
zh-hans.Herstmonceux, Sussex, England, United Ki: 英国英格兰素可賀斯特蒙瑟
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Fiennes于大约1422年出生在英国素可賀斯特蒙瑟时，他的父亲Sir Roger Fiennes40岁，母亲Elizabeth Holand20岁。他于1446年6月之后与Joan Dacre在英国倫敦结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1459年被列为7th lord dacre。他去世于1483年11月25日在英国素可賀斯特蒙瑟 卡素享年62岁，埋葬在英国素可賀斯特蒙瑟。

nameMeanings.name: Fiennes

variants.name: Finnis
meanings: Norman, English, Irish: locative name from Fiennes (Pas-de-Calais).  See also  Filtness  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Fiennes was born about 1422, in Herstmonceux, Sussex, England, his father, Sir Roger Fiennes, was 40 and his mother, Elizabeth Holand, was 20. He married Joan Dacre after June 1446, in London, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. In 1459, at the age of 38, his occupation is listed as 7th lord dacre. He died on 25 November 1483, in Herstmonceux Castle, Sussex, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in Herstmonceux, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Fiennes est né environ 1422, à Herstmonceux, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Roger Fiennes, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Holand, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Joan Dacre après juin 1446, à Londres, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. En 1459, à l’âge de 38 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est 7th lord dacre. Il est décédé le 25 novembre 1483, à Herstmonceux Castle, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Herstmonceux, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Fiennes um 1422 in Herstmonceux, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Roger Fiennes 40 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Holand 20. Er hat nach Juni 1446 in London, England Joan Dacre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1459, als er 38 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als 7th lord dacre aufgeführt. Er starb am 25. November 1483 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Herstmonceux Castle, Sussex, England und wurde in Herstmonceux, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Fiennes è nato il circa 1422 nel Herstmonceux, Sussex, England, il suo padre, Sir Roger Fiennes, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Holand, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Joan Dacre dopo il giugno 1446, nel London, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1459, all'età di 38 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come 7th lord dacre. Morì il 25 novembre 1483, nel Herstmonceux Castle, Sussex, England, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Herstmonceux, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Fiennesが約1422年にイギリススセックスハーストモンセウックスで生まれた時，父Sir Roger Fiennesは40歳，母Elizabeth Holandは20歳であった。1446年6月以後にイギリスロンドンでJoan Dacreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1459年，38歳の時，職業は7th lord dacreと記録されている。彼は1483年11月25日にイギリススセックスハーストモンセウックス カストルで62歳で死去し，イギリススセックスハーストモンセウックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Fiennes(이)가 대략 1422년 영국 수세스 허스트몬스우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Roger Fiennes(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Holand(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1446년 6월 이후 영국 런던에서 Joan Dacre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1459년, 38세의 나이로 그의 직업은 7th lord dacre이었다. 그는 1483년 11월 25일 영국 수세스 허스트몬스우스 카스틀에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 허스트몬스우스에 묻혔다.

mn.Herstmonceux, Sussex, England, United Ki: Herstmonceux, Sūþsēaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Fiennes nasceu aproximadamente 1422, em Herstmonceux, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Roger Fiennes, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Holand, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Dacre após junho de 1446, em London, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1459, com 38 anos, sua profissão aparece como 7th lord dacre. Ele faleceu em 25 de novembro de 1483, em Herstmonceux Castle, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Herstmonceux, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Fiennes родился около 1422 г. в местности хирстмонсеукс, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Roger Fiennes было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Holand, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Dacre после июнь 1446 г. в местности Лондон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. В 1459 году, в возрасте 38 лет,  он работал по профессии 7th lord dacre. Он умер 25 ноября 1483 г. в местности хирстмонсеукс кастл, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности хирстмонсеукс, суссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard Fiennes nació aproximadamente 1422, en Herstmonceux, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Roger Fiennes, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Holand, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Joan Dacre después de junio de 1446, en London, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. En 1459, a la edad de 38 años, su ocupación registrada era 7th lord dacre. Murió el 25 de noviembre de 1483, en Herstmonceux Castle, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Herstmonceux, Sussex, Inglaterra.
